description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with a test job in the default test stage that executes the following script lines: export PATH=$PATH:~/.nvm/versions/node/v10.9.0/bin/, python3.6 -m venv env, source env/bin/activate, pip install -r requirements.txt, export PYTHONPATH=`pwd`, npm run postinstall, and pytest -vv --show-capture all -m commit_test || true. Add a deploy job of type deploy (which places it in the deploy stage) that runs: git remote add heroku https://heroku:$HEROKU_KEY@git.heroku.com/cards-against-inet.git || true, git checkout master, git pull, and git push heroku master --force. Configure the deploy job to run only on the master branch. The pipeline pushes the application to Heroku as its deployment target.
